testcase.name: SauceDemo Inventory inventory page displays six products
SauceDemo Inventory sort by price low to high shows cheapest item first
testcase.failure: Error: Expected '$29.99' to equal '$9.99' at Context.<anonymous> (test/specs/inventory.spec.js:16:22)
testcase.system-out: [0-0] Selected sort: lohi [0-0] First price: $29.99 (expected $9.99) — sort may not have applied before assertion

testcase.name: SauceDemo Inventory clicking product name opens detail page
testcase.system-out: [0-0] Product detail page loaded — name element visible — PASSED

testcase.name: SauceDemo Login valid credentials navigate to inventory page
SauceDemo Login locked out user sees error message
testcase.system-out: [0-0] Error: 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.' — PASSED

testcase.name: SauceDemo Login empty username field shows validation error
testcase.system-out: [0-0] Error text: 'Epic sadface: Username is required' — PASSED
